svg.text: BASED ON HOW IT REACHED US
to have colluded on a lie
Classified by number of routes at each tabaqah:
but with lesser degree of dabt
REJECTED - DUE TO OMISSION IN THE ISNAD
Narrator conceals a flaw in the isnad;
he met but didn't hear from
REJECTED - DUE TO DISPARAGEMENT OF NARRATOR
more reliable; Munkar = da'eef contradicts thiqah
BASED ON WHOM IT IS ASCRIBED TO
Taammah: agrees from beginning of isnad
Qaasirah: agrees from a later point
Serves as a witness that the fard hadith
has a basis and strengthens it
Dr. 'Imaad 'Alee Jum'ah | at-Tahhaan, Tayseer Mustalah al-Hadeeth | as-Suyootee, Tadreeb ar-Raawee
Dabt: precise memory (heart or book), agrees with thiqaat
